debug_info.goal:
n : ℕ
x y : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n
f : GlobalTheorem.E✝ n → ℝ
⊢ deriv (GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv✝ n x y f) = GlobalTheorem.interpolated_deriv2✝ n x y f

failed_attempts:
funext t
  simp_rw [interpolated_deriv, ← interpolated, deriv_sum, deriv_const_mul, deriv_interpolated,
    interpolated_deriv2, mul_sum, ← mul_assoc, Finset.sum_comm, mul_comm]

funext t
  simp_rw [interpolated_deriv, deriv_sum, deriv_const_mul, ← interpolated, deriv_interpolated,
    interpolated_deriv, interpolated_deriv2, Finset.sum_comm]
  simp only [mul_comm, mul_assoc, mul_left_comm]

funext t
  unfold interpolated_deriv interpolated_deriv2
  simp only [deriv_sum, deriv_const_mul, ← interpolated, deriv_interpolated]
  simp_rw [interpolated_deriv, Finset.sum_mul, mul_assoc]
  rw [Finset.sum_comm]
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro i _
  apply Finset.sum_congr rfl
  intro j _
  ring
